text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since it's Valentine's Day tomorrow,<n>I decide to
give Narita Taishin a<n>present.
choice_data_list:
But what should I get her since she doesn't like
candy?

text_block_list.text:
I end up picking out some cookies<n>coated in bitter
chocolate and head<n>back.
Hm? What's that?
What? Oh... That's today?
No... Well, maybe. Kind of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't really exchange chocolate<n>with friends or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on, is that seriously for me?
...Huh. Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

That night, while I'm relaxing in my<n>room, there's
a knock at the door.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey... You in there?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Have you had dinner yet? If not, I<n>brought you
some food.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I stare at Taishin in confusion and<n>notice that
she's holding a container<n>filled with a dry curry
dish.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I haven't eaten yet, so I'm starving,<n>and I happily
accept the food. Still...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

Why are you acting like it's some<n>kind of huge
shock?
choice_data_list:
Because I didn't know you were such a good
cook!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not really. I just learned how to cook<n>since my
family runs a business. My<n>parents were too busy
to look after<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to make such a big<n>deal about it.
It's just a dry curry...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not lying or exaggerating. The<n>curry has a
mellow sweetness and<n>depth to it that makes me
wonder if it<n>has some secret ingredient.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess that's better than being<n>told it tastes
disgusting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I've got a curfew to keep.<n>Later.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin runs off as if desperate<n>to leave.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The taste of the curry leaves a<n>lingering hint of
sweetness in my<n>mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm so hungry and the curry is so<n>amazing that I
clean my plate before<n>realizing it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A brief silence hangs in the air.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You know that thing you said about<n>me believing in
myself?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I once told her that I'd believe in her<n>as long as
necessary until she<n>believed in herself too.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And I would believe in her even if it<n>took a lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... Hypothetically speaking...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What if I said that I believe in myself<n>now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What would you do?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Would you call it quits because<n>you've done your
job, and that's it?<n>You're gone?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it in so many words,<n>but I guess if
she's gained<n>confidence in herself, then that's
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I open my mouth to speak, but she<n>interrupts me
before I can get the<n>words out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, don't say anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not yet. I don't want to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sorry. I'm going back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin runs off as if desperate<n>to leave.

The taste of the curry leaves a hint of<n>bitterness in
my mouth.
